name: aberdeen-1995-limd-technology
title: New LIMD Technology: Speed Plus Real-World Experience
description: Frictionless Data Package archiving Aberdeen Group Technology Viewpoint (Volume 8, Number 15, December 1, 1995) analyzing Large-Scale In-Memory Database (LIMD) technology. The study examines how 64-bit architectures and large main memories deliver 10-100x performance improvements for data warehousing, OLTP, and decision support. Extracted entities, technologies, observations, and supporting codes are provided as normalized CSV resources.

sources.title: Aberdeen Group Technology Viewpoint Vol. 8 No. 15
sources.description: Original archived source via Internet Archive Wayback Machine

resources.name: studies
resources.title: Studies
resources.description: Master record for the source research study with full bibliographic metadata.

fields.name: study_id
fields.description: Unique slug identifier for the study

fields.name: study_num
fields.description: Sequential study number in the archival collection

fields.name: title
fields.description: Full title of the research study

fields.name: author
fields.description: Author(s) of the study

fields.name: publisher
fields.description: Publishing organization

fields.name: publication_date
fields.description: Publication date in ISO 8601 format

fields.name: study_type
fields.description: Type of study; references codes.csv code_type=study_type

fields.name: domain
fields.description: Subject domain; references codes.csv code_type=domain

fields.name: methodology
fields.description: Comma-separated list of methodologies used; references codes.csv code_type=methodology

fields.name: abstract
fields.description: Summary abstract of the study

fields.name: source_pdf
fields.description: Filename of the source PDF

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Canonical or archived URL of the study

fields.name: volume
fields.description: Publication volume number

fields.name: issue_number
fields.description: Publication issue number within the volume

fields.name: page_count
fields.description: Approximate page count of the study

fields.name: language
fields.description: ISO 639-1 language code

fields.name: geographic_scope
fields.description: Geographic scope of the study

resources.name: entities
resources.title: Entities
resources.description: Organizations mentioned in the study with current corporate status, acquisition history, and role in the study.

fields.name: entity_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the entity

fields.name: entity_name
fields.description: Full name of the organization as referenced in the study

fields.name: entity_type
fields.description: Type of entity; references codes.csv code_type=entity_type

fields.name: role_in_study
fields.description: Role the entity plays in the study; references codes.csv code_type=role_in_study

fields.name: current_status
fields.description: Current corporate status as of 2026; references codes.csv code_type=current_status

fields.name: status_notes
fields.description: Explanatory notes on corporate history and status

fields.name: hq_country
fields.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for headquarters

fields.name: founded_year
fields.description: Year the entity was founded

fields.name: acquisition_year
fields.description: Year the entity was acquired (if applicable)

fields.name: acquired_by
fields.description: Name of acquiring entity (if applicable)

resources.name: technologies
resources.title: Technologies
resources.description: Technologies discussed in the study with lifecycle status, obsolescence information, and modern successors.

fields.name: tech_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the technology

fields.name: tech_name
fields.description: Name of the technology as referenced in the study

fields.name: tech_category
fields.description: Technology category; references codes.csv code_type=tech_category

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of the technology and its role in the study

fields.name: lifecycle_status
fields.description: Current lifecycle status; references codes.csv code_type=current_status

fields.name: lifecycle_notes
fields.description: Explanatory notes on lifecycle trajectory

fields.name: introduced_approx
fields.description: Approximate year the technology was introduced

fields.name: obsolete_year
fields.description: Year technology became obsolete (if applicable)

fields.name: successor_tech
fields.description: Modern successor or equivalent technologies

resources.name: observations
resources.title: Observations
resources.description: All quantified and qualitative observations extracted from the study including benchmark results, hardware specs, performance claims, market statistics, and use cases.

fields.name: obs_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the observation

fields.name: study_id
fields.description: Foreign key to studies.csv study_id

fields.name: section
fields.description: Document section slug where observation appears

fields.name: observation_type
fields.description: Type of observation; references codes.csv code_type=observation_type

fields.name: subject_entity
fields.description: Foreign key to entities.csv entity_id (may be empty)

fields.name: subject_tech
fields.description: Foreign key to technologies.csv tech_id (may be empty)

fields.name: metric_name
fields.description: Machine-readable name for the metric measured

fields.name: metric_value
fields.description: Numeric or textual value of the metric

fields.name: metric_unit
fields.description: Unit of measurement for the metric value

fields.name: metric_qualifier
fields.description: Qualifying context for the metric (e.g., bound, condition, scenario)

fields.name: source_type
fields.description: Type of evidence source for the observation

fields.name: verbatim_quote
fields.description: Direct quote from the source text supporting the observation

fields.name: page_ref
fields.description: Approximate page number in source document

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Confidence level for the observation; references codes.csv code_type=confidence

resources.name: codes
resources.title: Codes
resources.description: Controlled vocabulary lookup table for all coded fields used across the other resources.

fields.name: code_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the code entry

fields.name: code_type
fields.description: Category/dimension the code belongs to

fields.name: code_value
fields.description: Machine-readable code value used in data fields

fields.name: label
fields.description: Human-readable label for the code value

fields.name: description
fields.description: Full description of what this code means
